Built with doc-gen4, running Lean4. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑Ctrl+↓to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️to focus. On Mac, use Cmdinstead of Ctrl.

-- Workaround for not being able to add ext lemmas from other modules.
@[ext] private def 
funext': ∀ {α : Sort u_1} {β : α → Sort u_2} {f₁ f₂ : (x : α) → β x}, (∀ (x : α), f₁ x = f₂ x) → f₁ = f₂
funext' := @
funext: ∀ {α : Sort u_1} {β : α → Sort u_2} {f₁ f₂ : (x : α) → β x}, (∀ (x : α), f₁ x = f₂ x) → f₁ = f₂
funext
@[ext] private def 
propext': ∀ {a b : Prop}, (a ↔ b) → a = b
propext' := @
propext: ∀ {a b : Prop}, (a ↔ b) → a = b
propext

/-- Ex falso for negation. From `¬ a` and `a` anything follows. This is the same as `absurd` with
the arguments flipped, but it is in the `not` namespace so that projection notation can be used. -/
def 
Not.elim: {a : Prop} → {α : Sort u_1} → ¬a → a → α
Not.elim {
α: Sort u_1
α : 
Sort _: Type ?u.267
Sort
Sort _: Type ?u.267

H1: ¬a
H1 : ¬
a: Prop
a) (
H2: a
H2 : 
a: Prop
a) : 
α: Sort u_1
α := 
absurd: {a : Prop} → {b : Sort u_1} → a → ¬a → b
absurd 
H2: a
H2 
H1: ¬a
H1

/-- Universe lifting operation -/
structure 
ulift.{r, s}: Type s → Type (max s r)
ulift.{r, s} (
α: Type s
α : 
Type s: Type (s + 1)
Type s) : 
Type (max s r): Type ((max s r) + 1)
Type (max s r) :=

up: {α : Type s} → α → ulift α
up :: (
down: {α : Type s} → ulift α → α
down : 
α: Type s
α)

namespace ulift

/- Bijection between α and ulift.{v} α -/
lemma 
up_down: ∀ {α : Type u} (b : ulift α), { down := b.down } = b
up_down {
α: Type u
α : 
Type u: Type (u + 1)
Type u} : ∀ (
b: ulift α
b : 
ulift: Type u → Type (max u v)
ulift.{v} 
α: Type u
α), 
up: {α : Type u} → α → ulift α
up (
down: {α : Type u} → ulift α → α
down 
b: ulift α
b) = 
b: ulift α
b
| 
up: {α : Type ?u.12504} → α → ulift α
up _ => 
rfl: ∀ {α : Type (max u v)} {a : α}, a = a
rfl

lemma 
down_up: ∀ {α : Type u} (a : α), { down := a }.down = a
down_up {
α: Type u
α : 
Type u: Type (u + 1)
Type u} (
a: α
a : 
α: Type u
α) : 
down: {α : Type u} → ulift α → α
down (
up: {α : Type u} → α → ulift α
up.{v} 
a: α
a) = 
a: α
a := 
rfl: ∀ {α : Type u} {a : α}, a = a
rfl

end ulift

/-- Universe lifting operation from Sort to Type -/
structure 
plift: Sort u → Type u
plift (
α: Sort u
α : 
Sort u: Type u
Sort
Sort u: Type u
 u) : 
Type u: Type (u + 1)
Type u :=

up: {α : Sort u} → α → plift α
up :: (
down: {α : Sort u} → plift α → α
down : 
α: Sort u
α)

namespace plift
/- Bijection between α and plift α -/
lemma 
up_down: ∀ {α : Sort u_1} (b : plift α), { down := b.down } = b
up_down : ∀ (
b: plift α
b : 
plift: Sort u_1 → Type u_1
plift 
α: Sort u_1
α), 
up: {α : Sort u_1} → α → plift α
up (
down: {α : Sort u_1} → plift α → α
down 
b: plift α
b) = 
b: plift α
b
| 
up: {α : Sort ?u.12894} → α → plift α
up _ => 
rfl: ∀ {α : Type u_1} {a : α}, a = a
rfl

lemma 
down_up: ∀ {α : Sort u_1} (a : α), { down := a }.down = a
down_up (
a: α
a : 
α: Sort u_1
α) : 
down: {α : Sort u_1} → plift α → α
down (
up: {α : Sort u_1} → α → plift α
up 
a: α
a) = 
a: α
a := 
rfl: ∀ {α : Sort u_1} {a : α}, a = a
rfl
end plift
